heading: Notification of establishment of advisory committee

children.text: a description of such advisory committee, including the subject matter of such committee;
a list of members of such advisory committee; and

in the case of an advisory committee created by the Director of National Intelligence, the reasons for a determination by the Director under that an advisory committee cannot comply with the requirements of chapter 10 of title 5.section 1003(b)(3) of title 5
